Event: Magic Training - Bombardier
Event Date: 01/08/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR198
Bombardier's Trainer Gear

Each attack made by the unit steals 10% physical armor and damage from the target for 5 sec. Stacks up to 10 times.

Once in a while, increases own physical armor by 60% for 5 sec and makes an additional shot at the target of the attack. On hit, the shot removes armor and weapons from the target for 4 sec. The enemy loses 45% armor stats and can't use armor and weapon abilities for 4 sec. Also, the shot deals an additional physical damage equal to 300% of the armor wearer's physical armor. The armor wearer restores health equal to 100% of the damage dealt.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
